posts.text: Whalesbook – 11 May 26 Jupiter Wagons' CAPEX Delayed as CARE Flags Mixed Fund Use Jupiter Wagons faces delays in using QIP funds for capital projects, CARE Ratings reports. While other funds are deployed, a ₹403cr QIP shows no CAPEX utilization. What investors are watching.
